triage_rows.detail: deterministic seeds improve trust, but broader session simulation still requires an explicit widening protocol
deterministic seed simulation is a phase-2 maturity signal only, not a replay-binding authorization

interpretation: V1.34H converts the deterministic seed audit into the next phase-2 direction judgment.
The seed simulator is now stable enough to be trusted as a narrow infrastructure object, but not yet broad enough to justify wider simulation or replay binding.
